text:
/ci1 1 おっ、大変そうだな！　手伝うぞ！
全部まとめて吹っ飛ばせばいいんだろ！
任せろ、私の一番得意なやつだ！

/ci2 1 ふふーん、どうだ、ばっちりだろう！
さあ、次の困ってるやつを
探しに行くぞ、サラ！

/ci4 1 ううう……ヒューイみたいに
上手くいかないな……くそっ！
サラ、帰って反省会！　反省会するぞ！

サラっ！？
無理はするなと言っただろ！

/ci1 1 Whoa, this looks pretty tough! I'll help! We should
just round 'em all up and blow 'em away, right?
Leave it to me—that's exactly what I'm best at!

/ci2 1 Heh-heh, how was that? Perfect, right!? Well,
let's go find the next person to help, Sarah!

/ci4 1 Ugh, damn. Guess I'm still not as good as Huey.
Sarah, let's head back for a postmortem. Before
WE'RE postmortem.
Sarah!? I told you not to be a heroine!
